testcase.name: test_get_podcast_metadata
testcase.failure:
def test_get_podcast_metadata(): podcast_id = "kongerekka"
metadata = psapi.get_podcast_metadata(podcast_id)
> assert "title" in metadata["series"]["titles"] E TypeError: 'coroutine' object is not subscriptable
common/test_psapi.py:10: TypeError

testcase.name: test_get_podcast_episodes
testcase.failure:
def test_get_podcast_episodes(): podcast_id = "berrum_beyer_snakker_om_greier"
episodes = psapi.get_podcast_episodes(podcast_id)
> for episode in episodes: E TypeError: 'coroutine' object is not iterable
common/test_psapi.py:20: TypeError

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: test_get_episode_manifest
testcase.failure:
def test_get_episode_manifest(): podcast_id = "kongerekka"
episodes = psapi.get_podcast_episodes(podcast_id) > manifest = psapi.get_episode_manifest(podcast_id, episodes[0]["episodeId"]) E TypeError: 'coroutine' object is not subscriptable
common/test_psapi.py:62: TypeError

testcase.name: test_get_latest_podcast_season
testcase.failure:
def test_get_latest_podcast_season(): podcast_id = "kongerekka"

testcase.name: test_get_podcast_episodes_by_season

failure.message: TypeError: object of type 'coroutine' has no len()

testcase.failure:
def test_get_podcast_episodes_by_season(): podcast_id = "kongerekka" season_id = "2020"
episodes = psapi.get_podcast_episodes(podcast_id, season_id)
> assert len(episodes) == 10 E TypeError: object of type 'coroutine' has no len()
common/test_psapi.py:81: TypeError

testcase.name: test_get_all_podcasts
test_update_podcasts_config
test_get_podcast
testcase.failure:
def test_get_podcast(): feeds_dir = "tests/rss" os.makedirs(feeds_dir, exist_ok=True)
podcast_id = "kongerekka" season_id = "2020"
> podcast = get_podcast(podcast_id, season_id, feeds_dir, 10)
test_generate_feeds.py:12: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
podcast_id = 'kongerekka', season = '2020', feeds_dir = 'tests/rss' ep_count = 10
def get_podcast(podcast_id, season, feeds_dir, ep_count = 10): existing_feed = get_last_feed(feeds_dir, podcast_id)
last_feed_update = parser.parse("1970-01-01 00:00:01+00:00") if existing_feed: for channel in existing_feed.findall('channel'): last_build_date = channel.find('lastBuildDate').text last_feed_update = parser.parse(last_build_date) logging.debug(f"Feed was last built {last_feed_update}")
metadata = get_podcast_metadata(podcast_id) if not metadata: return None
> original_title = metadata["series"]["titles"]["title"] E TypeError: 'coroutine' object is not subscriptable
generate_feeds.py:29: TypeError

testcase.name: test_get_podcast_void
testcase.failure:
def test_get_podcast_void(): feeds_dir = "tests/rss"
podcast_id = "kongerdekka" season_id = "2020"
> podcast = get_podcast(podcast_id, season_id, feeds_dir, 10)
test_generate_feeds.py:25: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
podcast_id = 'kongerdekka', season = '2020', feeds_dir = 'tests/rss' ep_count = 10
def get_podcast(podcast_id, season, feeds_dir, ep_count = 10): existing_feed = get_last_feed(feeds_dir, podcast_id)
last_feed_update = parser.parse("1970-01-01 00:00:01+00:00") if existing_feed: for channel in existing_feed.findall('channel'): last_build_date = channel.find('lastBuildDate').text last_feed_update = parser.parse(last_build_date) logging.debug(f"Feed was last built {last_feed_update}")
metadata = get_podcast_metadata(podcast_id) if not metadata: return None
> original_title = metadata["series"]["titles"]["title"] E TypeError: 'coroutine' object is not subscriptable
generate_feeds.py:29: TypeError
